problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: If Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
